[{'date': '2026-04-05 11:10:10',
  'headline': 'Is This ETF the Safest Way to Benefit From AI?',
  'publisher': '24/7 Wall St.',
  'summary': 'Every major AI buildout has needed one thing before the servers '

  'headline': 'FUTY Delivers 64% in Five Years While Charging Investors Next '

  'publisher': '24/7 Wall St.',
  'summary': 'Utilities have long been the portfolio’s boring backbone: '
